project.title: Jarvis Native Android (Capacitor) — Bluetooth A2DP Audio Fix
project.description: Wrap the Jarvis PWA in a Capacitor Android shell to fix the Android Chrome MODE_IN_COMMUNICATION bug that routes audio away from Sony WH headphones during getUserMedia. Native shell + audio mode flag plugin. Sideload APK only for v1.

instance.spawn_prompt: Atlas, build the Capacitor Android wrapper for the Jarvis PWA. Android Chrome forces MODE_IN_COMMUNICATION on the audio system when the PWA grabs the mic, killing A2DP output to Heath's Sony WH headphones. Build native shell + custom Capacitor plugin that sets MODE_NORMAL + keeps Bluetooth A2DP active during getUserMedia. Output signed APK for sideload to Z Fold. iOS plugin stub for future. Sideload only — no Play Store.

metadata.progress: 10/17 items completed. 4 blocked on toolchain. PWA hook commit 2a0dfea live on staging (no-op outside APK).

escalations.blocker: Android JDK 21 toolchain not installed locally — winget install hangs silently in non-interactive shell (likely UAC prompt invisible).
options: A — Install Android Studio interactively, ~30 min, recommended (one-click setup, includes JDK + SDK + emulator).
B — GitHub Actions CI build path (more YAML setup, no local toolchain needed, ~1 hr first time).
completed_before_block: jarvis-pwa.html getUserMedia hook — detects Capacitor, calls AudioMode plugin
Signing keystore script (scripts/generate-keystore.ps1, runs after JDK installed)
Git scaffold commit 1754f41 + PWA hook commit 2a0dfea live on staging

metadata.paused_reason: JDK + Android SDK not installed on host. winget hangs on UAC. Needs Heath to install Android Studio (Option A — recommended ~30min) or approve GitHub Actions CI build (Option B ~45min setup).
metadata.sweep_summary: atlas_4 — Jarvis Native Android (Capacitor) — Bluetooth A2DP Audio Fix. 13/17 complete, 4 blocked on Heath installing Android Studio OR approving GitHub Actions CI path. Marked failed (not retriable without Heath action). Code-side fully scaffolded + PWA hook is live on staging (no-op for non-Capacitor users). When Heath unblocks, atlas_5 can finish 11/12/13/15 in ~10 min.

instance.spawn_prompt: Build Audio Device Picker UI in Jarvis PWA so Heath can route DJI Mic + Sony WH-1000XM3 in-app. Z Fold tested. Staging only.

metadata.sweep_summary: atlas_1 — Jarvis Agent Instance Infrastructure (18/18 complete). Final mobile-responsive pending item knocked out by sweeper: added @media (max-width:500px) rules for .instance-card, .project-card, .checklist-item-row, .lessons-modal-card so AGENT STATUS + PROJECTS LEDGER + checklist modal are usable at 390x844 portrait. Shipped: schema migration (3 tables, RLS, realtime), spawn/update/complete/list-instances/list-projects APIs, spawn-jarvis-agent.js helper, dynamic instance cards w/ Realtime, checklist modal, PROJECTS LEDGER panel, project history modal, signed-in APV.

Sweep evidence: 12 TREC kb v2 tasks (38-7, 23-20, 15-7, 37-7, 49-1, 11-9, OP-H, 36-10, 34-7, 47-1, Buyer Rep Agreement, plus paragraph 6 of 20-18) all completed earlier today (2026-06-26 05:08–05:23 UTC). Agent_queue pulled the metadata-listed remaining forms and hadley delivered. Closing as complete — no remaining work. heath_action 968627c3 (atlas_sweep) can be marked done; no separate forms outstanding.
